scripts.build: pnpm --filter @tcrn/ui-tokens build && pnpm --filter @tcrn/ui-copy-state build && pnpm --filter @tcrn/ui-react build && pnpm --filter @tcrn/tms-react-pilot build && pnpm --filter @tcrn/aos-token-copy-state-pilot build && pnpm --filter @tcrn/design-system-storybook build
scripts.internal-alpha:proof: pnpm internal-alpha:contracts && pnpm internal-alpha:browser-proof && pnpm internal-alpha:aos-served-surface-proof && node scripts/internal-alpha-hardening-proof.mjs
scripts.public-docs:vercel-build: pnpm --filter @tcrn/ui-tokens build && pnpm --filter @tcrn/ui-copy-state build && pnpm --filter @tcrn/ui-react build && pnpm --filter @tcrn/design-system-storybook static-docs:build && pnpm public-output:scan
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @tcrn/ui-tokens test && pnpm --filter @tcrn/ui-copy-state test && pnpm --filter @tcrn/ui-react test && pnpm --filter @tcrn/design-system-storybook test && pnpm --filter @tcrn/tms-react-pilot test && pnpm --filter @tcrn/aos-token-copy-state-pilot test
scripts.verify: pnpm typecheck && pnpm build && pnpm test && pnpm exports:check && pnpm pack:smoke && pnpm storybook:smoke && pnpm public-output:scan && pnpm scan && pnpm scaffold:proof && pnpm internal-alpha:proof
